name: Algorhythm Holdings, Inc.
business: Algorhythm Holdings is an artificial intelligence technology company focused on the growth and development of SemiCab, an AI-enabled software logistics and distribution platform. The company provides contract-based, long-haul, full truckload transportation logistics and distribution services in India through a managed services model, and offers a SaaS-based service called Apex in the U.S. and other countries. Customers are primarily large, fast-moving consumer products companies in India, and target customers in the U.S. and Europe include third-party logistics providers, carriers, and shippers.
sellsTo: large, fast-moving consumer products companies in India
third-party logistics providers (3PLs) in the U.S. and Europe
carriers in the U.S. and Europe
shippers of consumer products in the U.S. and Europe

exposures.sentence: We are an artificial intelligence ( AI ) technology company focused on the growth and development of SemiCab. SemiCab is an AI-enabled software logistics and distribution business that utilizes our SemiCab technology platform to enable retailers, brands and transportation providers to address common supply chain problems globally.
